initial_candidates.sql:
WITH italian_customers_profit AS (
    SELECT 
        c.cust_id,
        SUM(s.quantity_sold * (c.unit_price - c.unit_cost)) AS total_profit
    FROM customers c
    JOIN countries co ON c.country_id = co.country_id
    JOIN sales s ON c.cust_id = s.cust_id
    JOIN costs c2 ON s.prod_id = c2.prod_id AND s.time_id = c2.time_id
    JOIN times t ON s.time_id = t.time_id
    WHERE co.country_name = 'Italy'
      AND t.calendar_month_number = 12
      AND t.calendar_month_desc LIKE '%2021%'
    GROUP BY c.cust_id
),
profit_buckets AS (
    SELECT 
        cust_id,
        total_profit,
        NTILE(10) OVER (ORDER BY total_profit) AS bucket_num
    FROM italian_customers_profit
)
SELECT 
    bucket_num,
    COUNT(*) AS num_customers,
    MIN(total_profit) AS min_profit,
    MAX(total_profit) AS max_profit
FROM profit_buckets
GROUP BY bucket_num
ORDER BY bucket_num;

WITH italian_customer_profits AS (
    SELECT 
        c.cust_id,
        SUM(s.quantity_sold * (cost.unit_price - cost.unit_cost)) AS total_profit
    FROM customers c
    JOIN countries co ON c.country_id = co.country_id
    JOIN sales s ON c.cust_id = s.cust_id
    JOIN costs cost ON s.prod_id = cost.prod_id AND s.time_id = cost.time_id
    JOIN times t ON s.time_id = t.time_id
    WHERE co.country_name = 'Italy'
      AND t.calendar_month_number = 12
      AND t.calendar_month_desc LIKE '%2021%'
    GROUP BY c.cust_id
),
profit_ranges AS (
    SELECT 
        MIN(total_profit) AS min_profit,
        MAX(total_profit) AS max_profit
    FROM italian_customer_profits
),
bucket_size AS (
    SELECT 
        (max_profit - min_profit) / 10.0 AS bucket_width
    FROM profit_ranges
),
bucketed_customers AS (
    SELECT 
        cust_id,
        total_profit,
        CASE 
            WHEN total_profit = (SELECT max_profit FROM profit_ranges) THEN 10
            ELSE CAST(FLOOR((total_profit - (SELECT min_profit FROM profit_ranges)) / (SELECT bucket_width FROM bucket_size)) + 1 AS INTEGER)
        END AS bucket_num
    FROM italian_customer_profits
)
SELECT 
    bucket_num AS bucket_number,
    COUNT(*) AS num_customers,
    MIN(total_profit) AS min_profit_in_bucket,
    MAX(total_profit) AS max_profit_in_bucket
FROM bucketed_customers
GROUP BY bucket_num
ORDER BY bucket_num;

WITH italian_customers_profit AS (
    SELECT 
        c.cust_id,
        SUM(s.quantity_sold * (c.unit_price - c.unit_cost)) AS total_profit
    FROM sales s
    JOIN customers c ON s.cust_id = c.cust_id
    JOIN countries co ON c.country_id = co.country_id
    JOIN costs c ON s.prod_id = c.prod_id AND s.time_id = c.time_id
    JOIN times t ON s.time_id = t.time_id
    WHERE co.country_name = 'Italy'
      AND t.calendar_month_number = 12
      AND t.calendar_month_desc LIKE '%2021%'
    GROUP BY c.cust_id
),
profit_buckets AS (
    SELECT 
        cust_id,
        total_profit,
        NTILE(10) OVER (ORDER BY total_profit) AS bucket_num
    FROM italian_customers_profit
)
SELECT 
    bucket_num,
    COUNT(*) AS num_customers,
    MIN(total_profit) AS min_profit,
    MAX(total_profit) AS max_profit
FROM profit_buckets
GROUP BY bucket_num
ORDER BY bucket_num;

WITH italian_customers_profit AS (
  SELECT 
    c.cust_id,
    SUM(s.quantity_sold * (c.unit_price - c.unit_cost)) AS total_profit
  FROM customers c
  JOIN countries co ON c.country_id = co.country_id
  JOIN sales s ON c.cust_id = s.cust_id
  JOIN costs c2 ON s.prod_id = c2.prod_id AND s.time_id = c2.time_id
  JOIN times t ON s.time_id = t.time_id
  WHERE co.country_name = 'Italy'
    AND t.calendar_month_number = 12
    AND t.calendar_month_desc LIKE '%2021%'
  GROUP BY c.cust_id
),
profit_buckets AS (
  SELECT 
    cust_id,
    total_profit,
    NTILE(10) OVER (ORDER BY total_profit) AS bucket_num
  FROM italian_customers_profit
)
SELECT 
  bucket_num AS bucket,
  COUNT(*) AS num_customers,
  MIN(total_profit) AS min_profit,
  MAX(total_profit) AS max_profit
FROM profit_buckets
GROUP BY bucket_num
ORDER BY bucket_num;

profit_buckets AS (
